instruction: In ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters, copy source/file1 into every directory matching node* recursively, excluding any path containing /backup/. Keep the copied file name as file1, preserve the source file modification time, and set copied file permission to 600.

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)
import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.write('cd ~/Desktop/deploy_lab'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter')

result.command: src=~/Desktop/deploy_lab/source/file1; ok=1; for p in ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node1/file1 ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node2/sub/node2a/file1 ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/group/node3/file1; do [ -f "$p" ] || ok=0; cmp -s "$src" "$p" || ok=0; [ "$(stat -c '%a' "$p")" = "600" ] || ok=0; [ "$(stat -c '%Y' "$p")" = "$(stat -c '%Y' "$src")" ] || ok=0; done; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/backup/node4/file1 ] || ok=0; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node5/backup/deep/file1 ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
